---
name: Documentation Issue
about: Report an issue with documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

Which documentation page or section has the issue?

**Page URL or Path:** [e.g., /docs/installation, README.md]

## Issue Type

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Missing information
- [ ] Outdated content
- [ ] Typo or grammar
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Missing example
- [ ] Unclear explanation
- [ ] Other

## Current Content

What does the documentation currently say?

## Suggested Improvement

What should it say instead? Or what should be added?

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the documentation issue.

## Affected Versions

Which version(s) of LaraCoreKit does this affect?

- [ ] Latest (0.0.2)
- [ ] Previous versions
- [ ] All versions

## Willingness to Help

Can you help improve the documentation?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I need guidance on how to fix it
